experiment: strict-confidence residual probe (confirmatory, fresh disjoint items)
honest_scope: fresh disjoint TriviaQA items; nested CV (no item scored by a model trained on it); strict bottom-12% entropy (exploratory-motivated, disclosed); SURVIVED = a linear direction separates confident-wrong from confident-right where the output is at chance, NOT 'the model knows'; probe may read familiarity; one run.
